title: TypeScript
subTitle: Typed frontend and a contract for agent output
overviewContent: TypeScript is my default for frontend work, and I treat strong typing as a contract for AI-generated code — well-defined interfaces make agent output verifiable and surface mistakes at compile time rather than in production. I use it across the H & H Lawyers rebuild, this portfolio and GroundedDoc for type-safe components, API models and data flow, keeping large codebases predictable and maintainable.
